hero.name: Dr. Atoshe Islam
hero.tagline: Advanced dental care, delivered with compassion
hero.description: Dr. Atoshe Islam combines rigorous surgical training with a patient-first approach — ensuring every visit is thorough, transparent, and respectful of your time and comfort.

about.title: About Dr. Atoshe Islam
about.subtitle: BDS (DU) · Specialist in Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery
about.bio: Dr. Atoshe Islam is a qualified dental surgeon with a Bachelor of Dental Surgery from the University of Dhaka and postgraduate training in Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery at Dhaka Dental College. With a commitment to evidence-based practice and patient-centred care, Dr. Islam founded his practice on a single principle: every patient deserves the same standard of treatment he would seek for his own family. Each consultation begins with a thorough assessment, a clear explanation of findings, and a shared discussion of treatment options — because informed patients make confident decisions.
about.qual2: PGT — Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery, Dhaka Dental College
about.qual3: Registered with the Bangladesh Medical & Dental Council
about.expDesc: From routine preventive care to complex surgical procedures, Dr. Islam maintains the same standard of meticulous attention for every patient. Practising across two clinics in Dhaka — Mirpur 14 and West Kafrul — he ensures accessible, high-quality dental care for patients across the city.

services.title: Comprehensive Dental Services
services.subtitle: From preventive care to advanced oral surgery — all under one roof
services.ctaTitle: Not sure which treatment is right for you?
services.ctaSubtitle: Schedule a consultation and Dr. Islam will assess your needs and recommend the most appropriate course of treatment.

implants.name: Dental Implants
implants.desc: The gold standard for replacing missing teeth. Titanium implants integrate naturally with the jawbone, restoring full function and aesthetics — with results that can last a lifetime with proper care.

wisdom.name: Wisdom Tooth Removal
wisdom.desc: Impacted or problematic wisdom teeth are assessed thoroughly before removal. The procedure is performed under local anaesthesia, with clear post-operative guidance to support a smooth recovery.

rootCanal.name: Root Canal Treatment
rootCanal.desc: Root canal therapy preserves the natural tooth by removing infected pulp tissue and sealing the canal. Modern techniques make the procedure far more comfortable than its reputation suggests.

cosmetic.name: Cosmetic Dentistry
cosmetic.desc: Teeth whitening, composite bonding, veneers, and full smile rehabilitation — tailored to achieve natural-looking results that complement your facial features and personal goals.

oralSurgery.name: Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery
oralSurgery.desc: For complex pathologies of the jaw, face, and oral cavity, Dr. Islam's postgraduate surgical training ensures precise, safe, and well-managed care from initial assessment to full recovery.

checkup.name: Checkup & Professional Cleaning
checkup.desc: Regular examinations and professional scaling are the most cost-effective investment in long-term oral health — catching early-stage issues before they require more extensive intervention.

whyUs.title: Why Patients Choose Dr. Islam
whyUs.subtitle: The qualities our patients mention most often

qualified.title: Clear Communication
qualified.desc: Every diagnosis and treatment plan is explained in plain language before any procedure begins. You will always understand what is being done and why — and your consent is never assumed.

bmdc.title: Fully Qualified & Registered
bmdc.desc: Dr. Islam holds a BDS from the University of Dhaka, postgraduate surgical training from Dhaka Dental College, and is fully registered with the BMDC (Reg. No: 16100).

sterilization.title: Clinical Sterilization Standards
sterilization.desc: All instruments are sterilized to hospital-grade standards prior to each appointment. Strict infection-control protocols are observed across both clinic locations.

comfort.title: Effective Pain Management
comfort.desc: Patient comfort is a clinical priority. Appropriate anaesthesia is administered for every procedure, and post-operative discomfort is proactively managed with clear aftercare guidance.

t1.name: Rahim Uddin
t1.text: I had been postponing my root canal for two years out of anxiety. Dr. Islam took five minutes before the procedure to walk me through every step. I felt very little discomfort — far less than I had anticipated.

t2.name: Nasreen Akter
t2.text: I had been suffering with wisdom tooth pain for weeks. Dr. Islam performed the extraction and personally followed up the next day to check on my recovery. That level of aftercare is exceptional.

t3.name: Shafiqul Islam
t3.text: My children used to be frightened of dental visits. They now ask when we are going back. That is perhaps the clearest sign of how Dr. Islam approaches his patients.
